content:
# Paleocurrent Analysis

**Summary**: The study of past sediment transport directions using geological evidence.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] performed paleocurrent-analysis to determine the prevailing wind direction.

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] applied paleocurrent-analysis to identify shifts in flow directions at stratigraphic boundaries.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] applied paleocurrent-analysis to identify shifts in flow directions at stratigraphic boundaries.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The dominant wind direction was determined to be east-northeast (N72°E). ([[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011, p. 128]])

- Paleocurrent directions showed a major shift from NW to NE at the base of the Upper Siq Sandstone. ([[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014, p. 25]])
